payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the URL fetch failed with a 404/network error. No source content was available to extract or store.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable source claims can be extracted.

details: No memory cards were created because no article content was available.
